RequestedRemedy.title: RequestedRemedy
RequestedRemedy.description: A record of a search query that returned no results, used for analytics.

searchQuery.description: The exact search term entered by the user.

timestamp.description: The last time this query was searched.

count.description: The number of times this term has been searched.

/requested_remedies/{queryId}.description: Collection of search terms that yielded no results.
